E THE CHILDREN GO TO CLASS. IN DECEMBER 1998 THE PARTIES SHALL RETURN TO FAMILY COURT SERVICES FOR FURTHER MEDIATION. THIS MATTER SHALL CONTINUE TO
, MOLEST, ATTACK, STRIKE, THREATEN, ASSAULT, BATTER, TELEPHONE, SEND ANY MESSAGES TO, FOLLOW, STALK, DESTROY THE PERSONAL PROPERTY OF, OR OTHERWISE
PROTECTED'S WORKPLACE, AND THE CHILDREN'S SCHOOL EXCEPT AT VISITATION. PEACEFUL CONTACT FOR THE PURPOSE OF VISITATION EXCHANGES SHALL BE ALLOWED.
